tasks.question: By the time Eleven found Mike in the woods, she __________ (already / escape) from the lab.
Will __________ (not / see) the Demogorgon before that night at Benny’s Burger.
Joyce realized that someone __________ (take) the Christmas lights from the wall.
Hopper understood that the lab __________ (hide) the truth about Barb’s disappearance.
The boys __________ (never / hear) of the Upside Down before Eleven showed them.
Before Eleven flipped the van, she __________ (already / use) her powers to crush a Coca-Cola can.
When Dustin found Dart in his trash can, he __________ (not / realize) that the creature was a baby Demogorgon.
By the time the boys built the sensory deprivation tank, Eleven __________ (never / try) to find someone far away before.
When Nancy and Jonathan attacked the Demogorgon in the Byers' house, they __________ (prepare) the bear trap and the bat with nails.
Hopper __________ (already / leave) the lab with the fake body before the doctors noticed that Will was still alive.
